description: MCP gateway configuration for Versailles. Controls which MCPs each agent role can access (progressive disclosure at the tool layer).

scout.description: Discovery agent — needs GitHub access to search for tools
scout.rationale: Scout only needs GitHub API to search and filesystem to write discoveries

bouncer.description: Security vetting agent — needs careful analysis, no external calls
bouncer.rationale: Bouncer uses sequential-thinking for careful analysis, GitHub for reputation checks, filesystem for moving files

evaluator.description: A/B testing agent — works entirely with local files and Anthropic API
evaluator.rationale: Evaluator only needs to read/write skill files; Anthropic API access is via environment variable, not MCP

evolver.description: TDD mutation agent — needs careful reasoning for mutations
evolver.rationale: Evolver needs sequential-thinking for careful mutation reasoning, filesystem for version management

researcher.description: Recursive research agent — needs broad information access
researcher.rationale: Researcher needs GitHub for finding repos, context7 for library docs, sequential-thinking for deep analysis

orchestrator.description: Top-level coordinator — can access all MCPs
orchestrator.rationale: Orchestrator manages all agents and needs full access to coordinate effectively

github.purpose: Search repos, check releases, read files, manage issues and PRs

filesystem.purpose: Read and write files within the repository

context7.purpose: Real-time library and framework documentation lookup

claude-flow.purpose: Spawn and coordinate sub-agents, manage swarms
claude-flow.note: Only orchestrator-level agents should have this access
